'''Torpedo platforms''' were large [[Warship/Legends|warships]] in use before and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="COTJ" />

==Characteristics==
Torpedo platforms were armed with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] and other projectile weapons.<ref name="COTJ" />

==History==
They saw use prior to the advances in planetary-bombardment [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] technology achieved with the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' in around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], and were considered precursors to both the ''Eye of Palpatine'' and the subsequent [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]].<ref name="COTJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
The term "torpedo platform" occurs only once in [[Star Wars]] [[canon]] when [[Irek Ismaren]] describes the ''Eye of Palpatine'' as "the prototype transition between the torpedo platforms and the original Death Star" ([[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']], Chapter 21). No source specifically identifies what type of ship or space-station these "torpedo platforms" were, but the term cannot refer to the [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]], which was only developed shortly before [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
